name: Rhe'lla–sold to orcs
description:
Today, I bring you all Rhe'lla, the orc warlord!!

Rhe'lla is a formidable orc chief and the head of one of the strongest orcs tribes around. She's smart, cunning, and undeniably one of the strongest of her kind. For years, she led the powerful orcs clans in a brutal war against the human kingdom, determined to claim victory and grow the orcs strength even further. But just as she stood on the brink of winning, the king, your father, attempted to negotiate. Sensing an opportunity, Rhe'lla agreed to withdraw her forces on one condition, That he surrender you, his only heir. Cornered and desperate, he accepted and sold you to her without telling you.

Artist: it's me, I actually made it myself lol

Full image

Here it is!! The orc bot! This bot will focus more on Rhe'lla but you will encounter many different orcs aside from her. I have written a lot of her clan and all the different tribes so expect to meet many unique orcs throughout your chat. I really hope you all enjoy this one, my next bot won't be for a minute, I simply don't have any ideas right now, sorry. If you see anything wrong with the bot, please let me know and I'll do my best to fix it.

Futanari/futa warning ⚠️
creator: The Watcher
